intro: I am excited to apply for the DevOps Data Engineer position at InnoVet Health. My experience in Azure, Databricks, Power BI, and Python-driven ETL pipelines aligns closely with your requirements.
body: At CITI, I designed and deployed Python/PySpark ETL pipelines, integrating telemetry data into cloud-based analytics platforms with automated monitoring and validation.
I implemented CI/CD pipelines and orchestration for Databricks jobs, ADF pipelines, and reporting deployments, ensuring operational reliability and production-grade quality.
I am proficient in automating deployment, data validation, and governance, and I have experience mentoring teams on DevOps best practices, cloud operations, and observability.
conclusion: I am eager to bring my cloud data engineering, DevOps, and AI-assisted pipeline expertise to InnoVet Health to deliver reliable, scalable analytics solutions supporting VA healthcare.
